card.name: MARATHINE

abilities.name: Blade Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, this model may move through enemy models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

abilities.name: Carve the Air
abilities.text: This model can move through other models.

abilities.name: Living Blade
abilities.text: This model does not have health and cannot be damaged or be killed. After a friendly Kastore is killed, remove this model from the game.

actions.name: Living Weapon
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action ignores (warding) abilities. A friendly Kastore heals 1.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

actions.name: Remove Their Claim
actions.effects: Remove the target and draw a card.

extraction_notes: Health bar appears to be absent or this model has 0 health as stated in Living Blade ability
Peon characteristic without visible number - defaulting to standard interpretation
